title: Rust crypto refresher: ownership, borrow, lifetimes
objectives: Recall move/borrow/lifetime rules on crypto types
Practice &[u8] vs Vec<u8> APIs for keys and signatures

title: Rust crypto refresher: traits, generics, constant-time
objectives: Read the subtle crate API and constant-time idioms

materials.ref: Jon Gjengset: crust of Rust generics

exercises: Implement ConstantTimeEq for a 32-byte struct
Design a Signer trait that cannot leak key material

title: Rust + arkworks: groups, fields, pairings
